info.title: GLOW API
info.description: Auto-generated OpenAPI schema from FastAPI v4 API

post.description:
Get persona information - handles both new (persona_id = NULL) and detail (persona_id provided).

Validation Logic:
- Tools are REQUIRED for resources - error if no tools exist (via missing_tools_check CTE)
- Agents are OPTIONAL - NULL agent_id means manual entry only (no generate button shown)
- Frontend components check agent_id before showing generate button
Get personas list with permissions and scenario details.
Save persona - handles both create (persona_id = NULL) and update (persona_id provided).
Duplicate a persona.
Delete a persona.

patch.description: Patch persona draft - accepts resource IDs and creates/updates draft.

post.description:
Get scenario information - handles both new (scenario_id = NULL) and detail (scenario_id provided).

Validation Logic:
- New mode: Check for valid departments
- Detail mode: Check scenario_exists and access
Get scenarios list with all relationships.
Save scenario - handles both create (input_scenario_id = NULL) and update (input_scenario_id provided).
Duplicate a scenario.
Delete a scenario.

patch.description: Patch scenario draft - accepts resource IDs and creates/updates draft.

post.description:
Get simulation information - handles both new (simulation_id = NULL) and detail (simulation_id provided).

Validation Logic:
- Tools are REQUIRED for resources - error if no tools exist (via missing_tools_check CTE)
- Agents are OPTIONAL - NULL agent_id means manual entry only (no generate button shown)
- Frontend components check agent_id before showing generate button
Get simulations list with permissions and relationships.
Save simulation - handles both create (input_simulation_id = NULL) and update (input_simulation_id provided).
Duplicate a simulation.
Delete a simulation (with usage check).

patch.description: Patch simulation draft - accepts resource IDs and creates/updates draft.

post.description: Get documents list with tags and scenarios.

- Frontend components check agent_id before showing generate button
Save document - handles both create (input_document_id = NULL) and update (input_document_id provided).
Duplicate a document.
Delete a document.

patch.description: Patch document draft - accepts resource IDs and creates/updates draft.

Get home overview with items and mappings.

Home always shows general simulations only (no simulationFilters parameter).
Bundle only returns top half (items + mappings), history is separate endpoint.
Get paginated home history with search, filters, sorting, and pagination.
Get complete reports overview bundle with history for individual profile - requires profileId.
Export reports data as CSV or ZIP file.
Get reports bundle with aggregated metrics per profile and entity mappings.
Get activity bundle with header metrics.
Get paginated list of activity entries.
Get complete dashboard bundle with all metrics, history, insights, and mappings.
Get paginated dashboard history with search, filters, sorting, and pagination.

Get practice overview data with items and all entity mappings.

Practice uses simplified filters: only profileId and departmentIds.
No cohort/role/date filtering for personal practice.
Note: History is not included in overview - use /practice/history endpoint separately.
Get paginated practice history with search, filters, sorting, and pagination.
Get leaderboard bundle with top profiles, metrics, and entity mappings.
Get paginated list of leaderboard profiles with metrics.
Get pricing metrics with model usage and cost analysis.
Get paginated, filtered, searched, sorted pricing runs for table.

Get benchmark overview with evals list and all entity mappings.

Benchmark uses department_ids filter (analytics endpoint pattern).
Note: History is not included in overview - use /benchmark/history endpoint separately.
Get paginated benchmark history with search, filters, sorting, and pagination.
Get health bundle with health KPIs and metrics.
Get paginated list of health activity metrics.
Refresh the analytics materialized view. Creates view if it doesn't exist.
Get complete attempt data with all related entities and computed values.
Bulk archive or unarchive simulation attempts.
Get complete eval attempt data with all runs and status.
Bulk archive or unarchive simulation attempts.
Process CSV file and map columns to target fields.
Search staff with query and filters.
Bulk create or update staff members (upsert).
Bulk delete profiles.
Process CSV file and map columns to target fields for documents.
Search documents for bulk operations.
Bulk create or update documents.
Bulk delete documents.
Decrypt a key's encrypted value.
Generate a certificate PDF/text for a profile.
Export reports data as CSV or ZIP file.

get.description: Download an upload by ID. If preview=True and file is PDF, returns first page as PNG.

options.description: Handle OPTIONS request for tus protocol discovery.

post.description: Handle POST request for tus protocol - create upload.

options.description: Handle OPTIONS request for specific upload.

head.description: Handle HEAD request for tus protocol - get upload info.

patch.description: Handle PATCH request for tus protocol - upload chunk.

post.description: Finalize a TUS upload and create upload record.
Get list of active auth provider options and departments for login page.

Get consolidated profile context (profile, departments, cohorts, breadcrumbs).

NOTE: Theme derivation stays in Python because it requires complex color math utilities
(hex_to_oklch, ensure_contrast, shade, tint) that are not available in PostgreSQL.
All other business logic is handled in SQL (see get_profile_context_complete.sql).
Get profile by email (for auth operations).
Create or update a profile based on email.
Search profiles that can be emulated by the requester.
Create emulation grant and return default-idp redirect URL.
Revoke emulation grants for the current profile.
Create new app feedback entry.

get.description: Authorization endpoint - handles Keycloak broker redirects.

post.description: Token endpoint - exchanges authorization codes for tokens.

schema.title: Response Token Default Idp Token Post

get.description: UserInfo endpoint - returns user claims from access token.

schema.title: Response Userinfo Default Idp Userinfo Get

get.description: JWKS endpoint for public key exposure.

RFC 8414 OAuth Authorization Server Metadata endpoint.

ChatGPT Dev Mode uses this endpoint to discover OAuth configuration.
This is required for OAuth to work with ChatGPT.

Rich health endpoint for dashboard.

Returns per-service status + latencies.
Automatically logs health checks to database when called by notify service.

post.description:
Trigger metrics snapshot to database.

Called by notify service to log metrics snapshot.
No leader election needed since notify service is single instance.

Trigger system initialization (SQL compilation and Keycloak sync).

Called by notify service to initialize system on startup.
Performs:
1. SQL type compilation (if types.py is missing or incomplete)
2. Keycloak sync to ensure identity providers are configured.

No authentication required - internal service-to-service call.

SimulationEndedPayload.description: Response indicating simulation was ended successfully.

SimulationEnterErrorPayload.title: SimulationEnterErrorPayload
SimulationEnterErrorPayload.description: Response indicating an error occurred while updating chat created_at timestamp.

SimulationEnterPayload.title: SimulationEnterPayload
SimulationEnterPayload.description: Request to update chat created_at timestamp when entering a chat.

SimulationEnterResponsePayload.title: SimulationEnterResponsePayload
SimulationEnterResponsePayload.description: Response indicating successfully updated chat created_at timestamp.

SimulationJoinErrorPayload.title: SimulationJoinErrorPayload
SimulationJoinErrorPayload.description: Response indicating an error occurred while joining simulation chat room.

SimulationJoinPayload.title: SimulationJoinPayload
SimulationJoinPayload.description: Request to join a simulation chat room for real-time updates.

SimulationJoinedPayload.title: SimulationJoinedPayload
SimulationJoinedPayload.description: Response indicating successfully joined simulation chat room.

SimulationLeaveErrorPayload.title: SimulationLeaveErrorPayload
SimulationLeaveErrorPayload.description: Response indicating an error occurred while leaving simulation chat room.

SimulationLeavePayload.title: SimulationLeavePayload
SimulationLeavePayload.description: Request to leave a simulation chat room.

SimulationMessageCancelledPayload.title: SimulationMessageCancelledPayload
SimulationMessageCancelledPayload.description: Response indicating a simulation message was cancelled.

SimulationNextErrorPayload.title: SimulationNextErrorPayload
SimulationNextErrorPayload.description: Response indicating an error occurred in simulation next.

SimulationNextPayload.title: SimulationNextPayload
SimulationNextPayload.description: Request to create next scenario for attempt.

SimulationStoppedPayload.title: SimulationStoppedPayload
SimulationStoppedPayload.description: Response indicating simulation was stopped successfully.

StartSimulationErrorPayload.title: StartSimulationErrorPayload
StartSimulationErrorPayload.description: Response indicating an error occurred while starting simulation.

StartSimulationPayload.title: StartSimulationPayload
StartSimulationPayload.description: Request to start a simulation attempt.

StopSimulationErrorPayload.title: StopSimulationErrorPayload
StopSimulationErrorPayload.description: Response indicating an error occurred while stopping simulation.

StopSimulationPayload.title: StopSimulationPayload
StopSimulationPayload.description: Request to stop an active simulation run.

StopVoiceErrorPayload.title: StopVoiceErrorPayload
StopVoiceErrorPayload.description: Response indicating an error occurred while stopping voice simulation.

StopVoicePayload.title: StopVoicePayload
StopVoicePayload.description: Request to stop a voice simulation session.

StopVoiceResponsePayload.title: StopVoiceResponsePayload
StopVoiceResponsePayload.description: Response from stopping a voice simulation session.
